text.message: U have a pretty unbeatable setup
not sure why you let blue talk you into that
There was no other spot for me
So figured may as well get some nbs while I’m at it
uh, how about the 6 4 3 you left them
What am I gonna do with all that sheep and no wheat or ore lol
you just allowed the a crazy setup
U got greedy trying to 6510 to 910
That’s the best setup for them tbh
Don’t blame the short game on me when it wasn’t first placement that set that up haha
He split up the board with first pick
or give you the exact same spot as me
It’s more that she left an ore with double wheat spot open lol
Red looks to be a run away
green on 5 with no road comp
You have robbed me every time
You and black tried to kill my game
